attributes.additional_details: Horse racing causes consistent harm: 214 horses died in 2024, over 100 in 2025, and dozens already in 2026. Fatalities at major events show this isn’t rare. Many suffer severe injuries or are later slaughtered when unprofitable. The sport is tied to heavy gambling, raising ethical concerns. Horses are sentient beings forced into risk for profit this is no longer acceptable.
attributes.background: Introduce a phased UK ban on horse racing, with immediate reforms: end high-risk races, ensure transparency on deaths, and stop slaughter. Redirect funding to horse welfare and worker transition, reduce gambling reliance, strengthen protections, and raise public awareness of animal harm.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban horse racing in the UK and fund transition to lifelong horse welfare safely.
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767059
